narrative:
Precinct Ironton 4G (precinct in Lawrence County) has 344 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.2 percentage points.
